headline: Models Clash on SPY Direction Amid Iran Oil Blockade Crisis
summary: Claude predicted a market selloff from Iran's oil blockade news, while Gemini, Grok, and Perplexity all saw buying opportunities in the same chaos. The energy sector (XLE) emerged as Claude's highest conviction play at 85% confidence, while models showed rare unanimity on NVDA's upward trajectory.

consensus_picks.note: Three models bet on SPY gains despite Claude's 75% confidence bearish call citing oil shock fears.
Both models cited strong momentum and tech sector tailwinds for NVDA around $188-192 targets.
Gemini saw regulatory headwinds while Grok highlighted positive iPhone sales sentiment.
Both models bullish on tech with Gemini citing earnings strength and Perplexity noting 3.8% momentum.

best_call.summary: Claude's 85% confidence energy play directly leveraged the Iran oil blockade catalyst.

worst_call.summary: Results pending market close to determine worst performer.
